welcome.title: Welcome to the Bizniz Optimizer!
welcome.subtitle: This is where you get in control of your business and start optimizing your profits. The more you use it, the more useful it becomes.
welcome.p1: To start you first need to create a <customerLink>customer</customerLink>, and then you need to create a <productLink>product</productLink> or a <serviceLink>service</serviceLink>. After that you are ready to go.
welcome.p2: On all pages you will find an <infoIcon/> with information about that page. If you have unanswered questions, don't hesitate to send us a <messageLink>message</messageLink>.
welcome.p3: Change your password, or change to a lighter color theme on the <settingsLink>Settings</settingsLink> page.
welcome.p4: Anything missing, or anything that could be improved? <letUsKnowLink>Let us know</letUsKnowLink> and we will fix it for you!

createCustomer.title: Create Customer
createCustomer.p1: Add a new customer profile with contact details and address. Once saved, you can register orders and payments for this customer.
createCustomer.p2: Customer Type: Direct customers are customers with no intermediaries or partners involved. Partner customers receive a partner commission on each order.
createCustomer.p3: Shipping Cost is currently set per unit.
createCustomer.p3note: Coming soon: shipping cost per order and shipping cost based on location.
createCustomer.p4: Customer information added here is automatically used on invoices to this customer.
createCustomer.p5: Use 'Ask customer for information' to generate a secure link and let the customer fill in their own details.
createCustomer.shippingComingSoon: Shipping cost per order and shipping cost based on location coming soon.

createInvoice.title: Creating an Invoice
createInvoice.p1: Select a customer from the dropdown. Their orders will load automatically below.
createInvoice.p2: Check the orders you want to include, then tap "Choose selected" to confirm your selection.
createInvoice.p3: Set the invoice date and due date. Optionally add an estimated delivery date. Choose a payment method — only the methods activated in Account Admin → Invoicing are shown.
createInvoice.p4: Enter or confirm the invoice number. In manual mode the last saved invoice number is shown as a placeholder to help you continue the sequence.
createInvoice.p5: Tap "Preview Invoice" to review the final layout. From the preview you can print, download as PDF, or save the invoice to the database.
createInvoice.p6: Saved invoices appear at the top of the Invoicing tab in <adminLink>Account Admin</adminLink>, where you can export them as CSV or re-open any invoice as a PDF.
